title: Ancestral Sword gives your primary creature Atk plus two

card.rawText: This card only affects your primary creature. Atk: +2.

plan.title: Ancestral Sword gives your primary creature Atk plus two
plan.summary: Play Ancestral Sword as field magic, attack with your primary creature, and verify the printed Atk bonus.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Atk bonus comes only from Ancestral Sword.

steps: Player 1 plays Ancestral Sword as field magic.
Run a follow-up battle with player_1 primary creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +2 Atk bonus
Ancestral Sword remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm the aura affects only its controller's primary creature.
riskNotes: This covers the positive controller primary case only.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Ancestral Sword's primary-creature Atk aura.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
